LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)
ORDER DISMISSING PAGA CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-12-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JONATHAN WALLRAVEN'S MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS DENIED AS FRAMED. THE COURT HAS THE AUTHORITY TO APPROVE THE SETTLEMENT OF A PAGA LAWSUIT. (LAB. CODE SEC. 2699(L)(2).) HOWEVER, THE CONFIDENTIAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND GENERAL RELEASE ATTACHED TO THE LEPERA DECLARATION DOES NOT SETTLE OR RELEASE ANY PAGA CLAIMS BROUGHT ON BEHALF OF AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES, BUT ONLY PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS. THERE IS NO STATUTORY BASIS FOR THE COURT TO APPROVE THAT INDIVIDUAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OR SCRUTINIZE ITS TERMS. THE COURT WILL APPROVE THE PROPOSED DISMISSAL OF THE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO THE PAGA CLAIMS ONLY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Jonathan Wallraven'S Motion For Approval Of Settlement Agreement (Stipulated Continuance From 4/22/2020)
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Jonathan Wallraven's Motion For Approval Of Settlement Agreement is denied as framed. The Court has the authority to approve the settlement of a PAGA lawsuit. (Lab. Code Sec. 2699(l)(2).) However, the confidential settlement agreement and general release attached to the Lepera declaration does not settle or release any PAGA claims brought on behalf of aggrieved employees, but only Plaintiff's individual claims. There is no statutory basis for the Court to approve that individual settlement agreement or scrutinize its terms. The Court will approve the proposed dismissal of the action without prejudice as to the PAGA claims only.

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
